name: Friendship Cake with Brandied Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, instant pudding mix, vegetable oil, and eggs in a large bowl. Beat until smooth with an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Fold in chopped nuts and about 1 cup of brandied fruit into the batter. The mixture will be thick.
3. Grease a tube pan and pour the batter into it.
4. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until cooked through.
5. Turn out the cake while hot.
Note: This cake freezes well. You can choose any cake mix (white, yellow, or fruit-flavored) and instant pudding mix (vanilla, lemon, orange, or butterscotch).
